title: Autocomplete : getWidgetRenderState giving me initial null result
body:
### 🐛 Current behavior

When typing on the search bar, I'm getting an error in the console as soon as it returns a result. However I get a null result pass thru in the getWidgetRenderState function in the vue-instantsearch.js file.

attaching screenshots below of the error and the file.

![Screenshot 2024-02-21 at 2 57 07 PM](https://github.com/algolia/instantsearch/assets/158744303/e2ea602e-2fa2-4824-aa21-785ce48ad5a9)
![Screenshot 2024-02-21 at 2 56 57 PM](https://github.com/algolia/instantsearch/assets/158744303/faae573d-da7c-4388-b9c7-b9b4d2104ead)

### This is the scopedResult object
![Pasted Graphic 1](https://github.com/algolia/instantsearch/assets/158744303/6fff57e7-8536-4c1d-b225-8edbe14f06e7)
![Pasted Graphic 2](https://github.com/algolia/instantsearch/assets/158744303/c9567a97-6dcf-4428-9de7-a305c18f508f)

as you can see, it's null. That is getting caught in my e2e.

### 💭 Expected behavior

to not get the error when typing

I'm wondering if the scopedResults should be filtered by results first, only the ones that's not null should be mapped.
I haven't tested this though. 

something like this:

```
 var indices = scopedResults.filter((scopedResult)=>scopedResult.result != null).map(function(scopedResult) {
          scopedResult.results.hits = escapeHTML ? escapeHits(scopedResult.results.hits) : scopedResult.results.hits;
....
```




I'm new to the Algolia instasearch ui lib, I've been reading for the past 2 days, I might be missing something. if this is not a bug I hope someone could lead me to the right direction 🙏



### Package version

@nuxt/algolia@latest

### Operating system

_No response_

### Browser

_No response_
